items.title: AMGEN TO PRESENT AT CITI'S 2025 GLOBAL HEALTHCARE CONFERENCE
items.description: Amgen (NASDAQ:AMGN) will present at Citi's 2025 Global Healthcare Conference at 1:45 p.m. ET on December 3, 2025. Peter Griffith, executive vice president and chief financial officer at Amgen, and Jay Bradner, executive vice president of Research and Development at Amgen, will present at the conference. The webcast will be broadcast over the internet simultaneously and will be available to members of the news media, investors and the general public.

items.title: AMGEN TO PRESENT AT THE 8TH ANNUAL EVERCORE ISI HEALTHCONX CONFERENCE
items.description: Amgen (NASDAQ:AMGN) will present at the 8th annual Evercore ISI HealthCONx Conference at 10:00 a.m. ET on December 3, 2025. Peter Griffith, executive vice president and chief financial officer at Amgen, and Jay Bradner, executive vice president of Research and Development at Amgen, will present at the conference. The webcast will be broadcast over the internet simultaneously and will be available to members of the news media, investors and the general public.

items.title: Truist Securities Assumes Amgen at Hold, Raises Price Target to $318
items.description: Truist Securities  analyst Gregory Renza   assumes Amgen (NASDAQ:AMGN) with a Hold rating and raises Price Target to $318.

items.title: Amgen Inc. (AMGN) is Attracting Investor Attention: Here is What You Should Know
items.description: Zacks.com users have recently been watching Amgen (AMGN) quite a bit. Thus, it is worth knowing the facts that could determine the stock's prospects.

items.title: Novo Nordisk Dives As Ozempic Fails To Slow Alzheimer's; Lilly Falls, Biogen Jumps
items.description: Novo Nordisk reported Monday that a Ozempic pill failed to slow the progression of Alzheimer's in two big studies. Novo dived, Eli Lilly fell. Biogen rose.
